text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 266 

PRE_ICL_MO_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Copay Standard Mail Order — Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a three-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part 
D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files)
